SiteSettings.title: SiteSettings
SiteSettings.description: Dynamic configuration settings for the travel portal including contact, carousel headers, promotional offers, and pricing details.

whatsappNumber.description: The active tour coordinator WhatsApp mobile phone number including country code.

promotionalOffer.description: Global promotional alert message displayed in the header banner.

adminPin.description: A 4-digit security pincode to authenticate custom adjustments.

carouselSlides.description: List of slides containing titles and base64 or Unsplash URLs for the Hero backdrop.

packages.description: State management representing current packages, descriptions, and dynamic prices.

paymentGatewayEnabled.description: Flag to enable direct payments and booking options.

upiId.description: UPI VPA address for scan-and-pay transactions.

upiQrCode.description: Base64 data or URL for custom business UPI QR code.

razorpayEnabled.description: Flag to enable Razorpay credit card/debit card gateway.

razorpayKeyId.description: Razorpay API key ID for payment initiation.

marqueeText.description: The scrolling marquee text displayed on the main page.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when configuration parameters were last committed.

/settings/site.description: Global dynamic config document representing tour prices, banners, promos, and WhatsApp channels.
